signals.headline: US Strikes Obliterate Iranian Capabilities; Vance Peace Talks Fail Amid Strait of Hormuz Blockade** | **YES** | **HIGH**
signals.raw:
US Strikes Obliterate Iranian Capabilities; Vance Peace Talks Fail Amid Strait of Hormuz Blockade** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence

Trump confirmed U.S. strikes hit over 7,000 Iranian targets, slashing missile launches by 90% and drone attacks by 95%, as the conflict enters its third week with a naval blockade on the Strait of Hormuz.[1][2] Vice President JD Vance's 21-hour peace talks with Iran
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by A
Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?
